{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "YouTube assistant",
  "description": "Avocado Virtual Solutions (AVS) is a professional recruitment agency and business support service dedicated to helping entrepreneurs, small businesses, and busy professionals streamline their operations. We specialize in administrative support, customer service, social media management, recruitment assistance with onboarding, and business/company branding. Our mission is to help clients save time, enhance productivity, and build strong, recognizable brands while they focus on growing their businesses.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: YouTube assistant

Job Location:&nbsp;Remote

About the Role


	We&rsquo;re hiring a YouTube Content Assistant to support a faith-based (prayer-focused) YouTube channel.
	This role is primarily focused on visual content creation (flyers/graphics) to support live sessions and channel growth.
	This is a simple but consistency-driven role&mdash;ideal for someone who is organized, responsive, and understands clean, engaging design.


Key Responsibilities


	Assist with uploading and scheduling YouTube videos
	Write engaging video titles, descriptions, and captions
	Create or coordinate thumbnail designs
	Conduct keyword and hashtag research for YouTube SEO
	Monitor channel analytics and performance metrics
	Respond to comments and engage with the audience professionally
	Organize video files, content calendars, and publishing schedules
	Assist with content ideas, trends, and competitor research
	Ensure videos are properly optimized before publishing
	Support collaborations, promotions, and community-building efforts.


Requirements


	Basic understanding of YouTube content management and growth strategies
	Familiarity with YouTube Studio and analytics
	Strong written and verbal communication skills
	Ability to work independently and meet deadlines
	Creative thinking and attention to detail
	Experience with Canva, CapCut, or basic editing tools is an added advantage
	Social media management experience is a plus.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;avsabujahr@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

YouTube assistant Job at Avocado Virtual Solutions




        
    

        
        Avocado Virtual Solutions (AVS) is a professional recruitment agency and business support service dedicated to helping entrepreneurs, small businesses, and busy professionals streamline their operations. We specialize in administrative support, customer service, social media management, recruitment assistance with onboarding, and business/company branding. Our mission is to help clients save time, enhance productivity, and build strong, recognizable brands while they focus on growing their businesses.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: YouTube assistant

Job Location: Remote

About the Role
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We’re hiring a YouTube Content Assistant to support a faith-based (prayer-focused) YouTube channel.
	This role is primarily focused on visual content creation (flyers/graphics) to support live sessions and channel growth.
	This is a simple but consistency-driven role—ideal for someone who is organized, responsive, and understands clean, engaging design.


Key Responsibilities


	Assist with uploading and scheduling YouTube videos
	Write engaging video titles, descriptions, and captions
	Create or coordinate thumbnail designs
	Conduct keyword and hashtag research for YouTube SEO
	Monitor channel analytics and performance metrics
	Respond to comments and engage with the audience professionally
	Organize video files, content calendars, and publishing schedules
	Assist with content ideas, trends, and competitor research
	Ensure videos are properly optimized before publishing
	Support collaborations, promotions, and community-building efforts.


Requirements


	Basic understanding of YouTube content management and growth strategies
	Familiarity with YouTube Studio and analytics
	Strong written and verbal communication skills
	Ability to work independently and meet deadlines
	Creative thinking and attention to detail
	Experience with Canva, CapCut, or basic editing tools is an added advantage
	Social media management experience is a plus.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.
